title: Ashka Boda

{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''This'' is the ''Jedi Holocron''…given to me many years ago by a very old Jedi…before his…''untimely'' departure.|Palpatine, to Leia Organa Solo|audio=AshkaBoda.flac|<ref name="DE5">[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]]</ref>}}
'''Ashka Boda''' was an aged and wise [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] from the period of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A revered member of the [[Librarian's Assembly]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Boda maintained the large collection of [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]] and other [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifacts]] located within the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Archives]]. Shortly before the start of the Clone Wars, Boda and fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master [[Jabidus Inspra]] led a team of Jedi to the isolated [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] to investigate a sighting of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. After the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the end of the Clone Wars, Boda came into possession of the [[Tedryn Holocron]], a vast library of Jedi teachings previously owned by the [[Krevaaki]] Jedi Master [[Bodo Baas]], who had recently [[Death/Legends|become victim]] to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]].

Boda joined forces with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Halagad Ventor]] to form a network of Jedi survivors of the [[destruction of the Almas Academy]]; however, many of these Jedi were soon exterminated after Ventor compromised their location during an Imperial interrogation. Boda was soon captured by Imperial forces and escorted by Palpatine's elite [[Imperial Sentinel]]s back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where he was [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] and eventually killed. Palpatine, alias the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] Darth Sidious, discovered the Tedryn Holocron among Boda's belongings and used its vast repository of knowledge to learn how to [[Transfer essence|transfer his own essence]] into a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body. Although Sidious later claimed to have been given the holocron by Boda, Jedi Master [[Tionne Solusar]] uncovered the truth about Ashka Boda's fate long after [[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|Sidious's final death]].

==Biography==
===Fugitive of the Empire===
{{Quote|Some time before I traveled to Cato Neimoidia, Master Ashka Boda contacted me with news that he had joined the former Almas Academy student Halagad Ventor in trying to form a network between the scattered Jedi survivors of the destruction of the academy.|Jedi Master Denia|<ref name="EotJ">{{DoD|Echoes of the Jedi}}</ref>}}
Ashka Boda was a long-lived [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="DEEndnotes" /> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] from around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="EGttF" /> Boda was a revered member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Librarian's Assembly]] and worked alongside [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] member [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] in maintaining the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] vast collection of [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]], scrolls, and tomes.<ref name="Databank">{{DB|character|yaddle|Yaddle}}</ref> A close confidant of Jedi Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], Boda and Jinn shared a fascination in the study of immortality.<ref name="Lone Wolf">{{StoryCite|story=Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke|book=SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story}}</ref> In the weeks leading up to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master and [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], traveled to the isolated [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]] to purchase a special pre-Republic era [[Solar sailer/Legends|solar sail]] for his personal [[Count Dooku's solar sailer/Legends|solar sailer]].<ref name="LoE">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref> Reports of Dooku's presence in the Enclave reached the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as well as the Jedi, but only after his departure from the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. Ashka Boda and fellow Jedi Master [[Jabidus Inspra]] led an investigative [[Task force/Legends|task force]] of five Jedi from the Jedi Temple into the Enclave to determine the purpose of Dooku's visit.<ref name="HNN" />

[[File:TedrynHolocroncrop-EGTF.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ashka Boda came into possession of the Tedryn Holocron after Jedi Master Bodo Baas's execution by Emperor Palpatine.]]
Shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], also known as Darth Sidious, initiated the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]]<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref> and captured the ancient [[Krevaaki]]<ref name="FactFile">{{FactFile|74|BAA 1-2|Bodo Baas}} {{C|German version}}</ref> Jedi Master [[Bodo Baas]], possessor of the famed [[Tedryn Holocron]] that stored the teachings and experiences of Jedi Masters long past.<ref name="EGttF" /> Baas was [[Death/Legends|executed]] by Sidious toward the beginning of the Purge;<ref name="EGtC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> however, the Tedryn Holocron eventually found its way into the possession of Ashka Boda<ref name="DEEndnotes" /> along with a [[Belt of Bodo Baas|belt]] that Baas had once owned.<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=item|Belt of Master Bodo Baas}}</ref>

Boda collaborated with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Halagad Ventor]] in an effort to establish a network of Jedi from the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] who had survived the [[Destruction of the Almas Academy|destruction]] of the [[Almas Academy]]. Boda informed Jedi Master [[Denia]] of the creation of this network;<ref name="EotJ" /> however, these Jedi were nearly all hunted down and killed in the Purge after Ventor was forced to reveal their location in an interrogation by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="DoE">''[[Domain of Evil]]''</ref>

Boda, too, was captured along with several other Jedi at the scene of another battle. A group of [[Imperial Sentinel]]s—towering, mutated warriors created by Sidious's [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adepts]]—possessed cryptic yet authentic [[Datachip/Legends|datachips]] that gave them disposition over Boda. The Sentinels formed a praetorian guard around Boda as he was escorted back to their [[Lictor-class dungeon ship|dungeon ship]] and summarily transported to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]].<ref name="DESourcebook " /> Once there, Sidious [[Torture/Legends|tortured]]<ref name="NEGtC ">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> and murdered the Jedi Master and discovered the Tedryn Holocron among his belongings.<ref name="DEEndnotes" />

===Legacy===
{{Quote|Leia escaped with a Jedi Holocron—by all appearances a milky jade crystal block—that Palpatine claimed had been given to him by an aged Jedi Master. Subsequent research eventually determined that the Jedi Master was Ashka Boda, who was slain by Palpatine during the Jedi Purge at the end of the Clone Wars.|Tionne Solusar|<ref name="EGttF" />}}
Sidious used the knowledge that he gained from the Tedryn Holocron to learn the secret of [[Transfer essence|spirit transference]], allowing him to transfer his essence into [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies.<ref name="Book of Sith">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref> Other information he used in the creation of ''[[The Book of Anger]]'', the first volume of his ''[[Dark Side Compendium]]''.<ref name="DEEndnotes4">[[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]], part 4: ''For a Thousand Generations''</ref> [[10 ABY/Legends|Six years after]] the Empire's crushing defeat at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> a reborn Sidious<ref name="DE2">[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]]</ref> initiated a [[Operation Shadow Hand|military campaign]] to retake [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="DE1">[[Dark Empire 1|''Dark Empire'' 1]]</ref> Amidst the chaos, [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was captured by Sidious's forces. The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], suffering from the effects of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] on his degenerating clone body, introduced the Princess to the Tedryn Holocron, claiming to have been given the device by Ashka Boda before the Jedi Master's disappearance.<ref name="DE5" /> The holocron soon fell into New Republic hands, but the truth about Ashka Boda's fate was not revealed until a [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force|report]] on the history of the holocron was recorded in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] by Jedi Master [[Tionne Solusar]] of the [[New Jedi Order]].<ref name="EGttF" />

==Personality and traits==
Ashka Boda was a wise and aged Jedi Master during the Clone Wars.<ref name="DEEndnotes" /> He was considered by many to be great and famous<ref name="DESourcebook " /> and was a revered scholar of the Librarian's Assembly of the Jedi Order.<ref name="Databank" /> Darth Sidious considered Boda and the knowledge he carried important enough to have him escorted to Coruscant by his personal bodyguards.<ref name="DESourcebook " />

==Powers and abilities==
Ashka Boda, a Jedi mystic,<ref name="Lone Wolf" /> possessed the knowledge and skills to attain the rank of Jedi Master<ref name="EGttF" /> and to become a member of the Librarian's Assembly of the Jedi Order,<ref name="Databank" /> as well as one of the Jedi Temple's curators.<ref name="NEGtC " /> He had learned and perfected the technique of essence transfer, which Darth Sidious would find useful.<ref name="Book of Sith" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ashka Boda was first mentioned in the [[Dark Empire endnotes|endnotes]] written by [[Tom Veitch]] at the end of the [[Dark Empire 2|second issue]] of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]''. He received his first in-universe mention in the [[Dark Empire 5|fifth issue]] of ''Dark Empire'' along with a further expansion in the endnotes at the end of the issue. He has since been mentioned and expanded upon in a variety of sources.
